project.name: Knowledge Hub
project.description: Internal memory and handoff service for AI-assisted work sessions.
project.current_goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
project.rules: Prefer automation over manual entry. Keep the system simple, reliable, and ready for future multi-user growth.

focus.current_goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
focus.recommended_next_step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.
active_blockers: Real Render values are still missing for public base URL, SMTP host, owner email, and secret key
Production SMTP is still not verified end-to-end against the live service

latest_snapshot.title: Current internal state
latest_snapshot.content: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.

recent_decisions.task: Add a production env status page for Render-facing configuration
recent_decisions.summary: Knowledge Hub now shows a dedicated deploy env status page, API, and CLI so missing, default, or blocking production env variables are obvious before the first live deploy.
recent_decisions.next_step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.

recent_decisions.task: Add public-base-url handling and a Render deploy setup guide
recent_decisions.summary: Knowledge Hub now supports KH_PUBLIC_BASE_URL for stable magic-link URLs and ships a copy-friendly deploy setup guide with phased Render env values for SMTP first and auth-required second.
recent_decisions.next_step: Add one production env status page that makes the remaining real Render values impossible to miss before the first live deploy.

recent_decisions.task: Add auth-required private mode on top of magic-link login
recent_decisions.summary: Knowledge Hub can now require sign-in for private pages and APIs, preserve next targets after magic-link login, and warn if production auth is enabled without real mail delivery.
recent_decisions.next_step: Prepare the first provider-ready Render email setup path and tighten the deploy checklist around real production env values.

starter_template.title: Continue Knowledge Hub work
starter_template.content: Read the ready-for-next-chat handoff first, do not ask to restate context, and focus on the next production-safe improvement.

bootstrap_text:
You are joining ongoing work on the project 'Knowledge Hub' (knowledge-hub).
Current goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
Recommended next step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.
Active blockers: Real Render values are still missing for public base URL, SMTP host, owner email, and secret key, Production SMTP is still not verified end-to-end against the live service.
Project rules: Prefer automation over manual entry. Keep the system simple, reliable, and ready for future multi-user growth.
Latest snapshot: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.
Recent decisions:
- Knowledge Hub now shows a dedicated deploy env status page, API, and CLI so missing, default, or blocking production env variables are obvious before the first live deploy.
- Knowledge Hub now supports KH_PUBLIC_BASE_URL for stable magic-link URLs and ships a copy-friendly deploy setup guide with phased Render env values for SMTP first and auth-required second.
- Knowledge Hub can now require sign-in for private pages and APIs, preserve next targets after magic-link login, and warn if production auth is enabled without real mail delivery.
Key files touched recently: src/knowledge_hub/services/deploy_env_status.py, src/knowledge_hub/templates/deploy_env_status.html, src/knowledge_hub/blueprints/main.py, tools/deploy_env_status.py.
Preferred chat instruction: Read the ready-for-next-chat handoff first, do not ask to restate context, and focus on the next production-safe improvement.
Do not ask to restate the basic context. Continue from this state and move the work forward.
